data.reasoningText:
The project uses Microsoft.Testing.Platform (indicated by `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). Let me look at the test file and then run the tests with TRX output.

With Microsoft.Testing.Platform and `dotnet test`, TRX reporting should work with `--logger trx`. Let me run it.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-5552d4f8e6f04b279e63093a25335b4a && dotnet test --logger \"trx;LogFileName=TestResults.trx\" 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with TRX logger", "initial_wait": 60}
